lines.speaker: Elder Krill
lines.text: Hello there, human. Interested in some fish? Or maybe you need some fishing supplies?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you often sell to humans?

lines.speaker: Elder Krill
lines.text: Oh yes. In fact, I sell to humans far more than I sell to tortugans. Most of our kind have no issues with catching their own fish, and can normally do so without all these tools you humans use.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Surely business is quite slow then? There aren't many humans around here.

lines.speaker: Elder Krill
lines.text: Not on the island itself, but we do sometimes allow human vessels to dock here for trade. However, truth be told, I don't need to do much trading with them these days.

lines.speaker: Elder Krill
lines.text: It's a lot of effort, and at my age, there is little need in trying to make a large profit. As long as I have enough to get by, I'm happy.

lines.speaker: Elder Krill
lines.text: Anyway, did you want to buy anything?
